rulings.Case Title: GINBINEH TESSEMA AYELE VS. GENEVA PHAMACEUTICAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Selected Allegations And Claims For Damages
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE IS GRANTED. THE ALLEGATIONS AT 37-39, AND THE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVES ON PAGE 9, LINE 8, ARE STRICKEN. THE ALLEGATIONS IN 40 AND 41 DO NOT APPLY TO THIS DEFENDANT AND ARE STRICKEN. THE WORD "ME" IS STRICKEN FROM PAGE 4, LINES 7 AND 11. (JH)

rulings.Case Title: GINBINEH TESSEMA AYELE VS. GENEVA PHAMACEUTICAL et al
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO THE 4TH, 5TH, AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, AS PLAINTIFF CANNOT STATE A CAUSE FOR LOSS OF CONSORTIUM CAUSED BY HIS OWN ALLEGED INJURIES. (JH)
